controlDocuments.name: Gateway Program Requirements Document (PRD)

controlDocuments.name: PPE Failure Modes and Effects Analysis (FMEA)
controlDocuments.notes: Comprehensive FMEA for all PPE subsystems; drives redundancy requirements for AEPS thrusters and GNC

controlDocuments.name: PPE-HALO Delta-V Budget and Propulsion Analysis
controlDocuments.notes: NRHO orbit maintenance delta-V budget; lunar transit trajectory analysis per T-134; PPE propellant margin verification

controlDocuments.name: PPE System Requirements Specification (SRS)
controlDocuments.notes: PPE system-level requirements; approved at PPE CDR (M-010); last updated to reflect HLS controllability interface per T-019 analysis

controlDocuments.name: PPE Critical Design Review Package
controlDocuments.notes: Complete PPE CDR data package; 847-page master document; all RIDs closed; CDR board certification archived

controlDocuments.name: HALO System Requirements Specification (SRS)
controlDocuments.notes: HALO system requirements; baselined at HALO CDR (M-011); one mass-related RID still open per T-009 tiger team

controlDocuments.name: HALO Critical Design Review Package
controlDocuments.notes: HALO CDR data package; 12 RIDs opened; 11 closed by CDR+90 days; 1 mass-related RID open and tracked by tiger team (T-009)

controlDocuments.name: HALO Preliminary Hazard Analysis (PHA)
controlDocuments.notes: System-level hazard identification for HALO; updated post-CDR; drives ECLSS and FDIR requirements per T-052

controlDocuments.name: HALO Mass Reduction Engineering Review Report
controlDocuments.notes: Systematic design review for HALO mass reduction; addresses GAO-24-106878 R-001; identifies 250 kg reduction target; tied to T-009

controlDocuments.name: Gateway-Orion Interface Control Document (ICD)
controlDocuments.notes: Orion-to-HALO docking interface; IDS-compatible; jointly owned by Gateway and Orion programs; drives T-056 docking port design

controlDocuments.name: HALO Failure Modes and Effects Analysis (FMEA)
controlDocuments.notes: HALO FMEA including ECLSS avionics power and thermal subsystems; 847 failure modes analyzed

controlDocuments.name: UAE Airlock Safety Assessment
controlDocuments.notes: Safety assessment for EVA airlock per T-099 CDR requirements; pressurization hazard analysis; drives T-100 design

controlDocuments.name: I-HAB Preliminary Design Review Package
controlDocuments.notes: I-HAB PDR package; ESA formal review; JAXA ECLSS section submitted separately; habitation volume confirmed sufficient

controlDocuments.notes: Verification approach for I-HAB interfaces with SLS co-manifest system and Gateway docking; drives T-085 and T-086

controlDocuments.name: Gateway Safety Requirements Document (SRD)

controlDocuments.name: Gateway Program Environmental Impact Statement (EIS)
controlDocuments.notes: Required NEPA EIS for Gateway launches from KSC; environmental impact assessment per T-007

controlDocuments.name: Gateway Integrated Master Schedule (IMS)
controlDocuments.notes: Integrated schedule with 165 program tasks; maintained in Primavera P6; monthly update; 850+ activities including sub-tasks

controlDocuments.name: Gateway Integrated Financial Plan (IFP)
controlDocuments.notes: Quarterly cost plan vs. actuals; EVM metrics; FY cost phasing; presented at quarterly program reviews

controlDocuments.name: International Partner Implementing Arrangements
controlDocuments.notes: Signed implementing arrangements with ESA and JAXA (2020); CSA Implementing Arrangement signed 2020; MBRSC MOU signed January 2024

controlDocuments.notes: Formal NASA response and corrective action plan; mass reduction target 250 kg from HALO; documented per GAO recommendation; tied to T-009

controlDocuments.name: Gateway Program Requirements Document (PRD)
controlDocuments.notes: Top-level program requirements; 1200+ Level 2 requirements; baselined at PCA (M-009); updated for mass reduction actions per GAO-24-106878; DOORS database
